Index.title: Blurthis instantly blurs sensitive data in screenshots.
Index.description: Zero setup. Zero tracking. Just drag, select, and download. Perfect for developers and builders sharing on Twitter.
Index.uploadSub: Drag and drop or click to upload
Index.privacyNote: Privacy first: Processing happens in your browser

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: No data ever leaves your computer. Everything stays in your browser.

zero.title: Zero Dependencies
zero.desc: Native Canvas API for maximum speed and zero tracking scripts.

workflow.desc: Optimized for speed. Drag, select a region, download as PNG.

editor.title: Blur Editor
